Confidential Term Sheet — Project “Harbor Quill” for proposed acquisition of Heliava Health Bancorp, Inc. (a U.S. issuer) by Vastrum Capital Partners, L.P. (“Buyer”); non-binding summary of principal terms.
Consideration: $14.25 per share in cash, subject to a symmetric collar tied to the NQX Health Financial Index; no financing outs; expected closing in Q4 2026, pending customary approvals.
Digital assets: carve-out for Heliava’s “CryptoCare” wallet pilot (DPT services for patient refunds); Buyer to assume stablecoin reserve obligations with an independent on-chain attestation at or after public announcement; this pilot has not been disclosed publicly.
Cyber: Parties acknowledge a contained ransomware event on 05/22/26 impacting ~2.1% of clinic endpoints; draft forensics in data room; no confirmed exfiltration of PHI or NPI to date.
ESG/climate: Earnout up to $30,000,000 based on Scope 1+2 emissions reductions at Heliava’s mail‑order pharmacy; green capex budget baseline anchored to 2025 public sustainability pages and utility invoices.
Regulatory/Reg FD: No selective disclosure to sell‑side analysts, buy‑side personnel, or any market professionals prior to joint press release and Form 8‑K; limited wall‑cross of analysts permitted under NDA and information‑barrier protocols.
Information barriers: Buyer to maintain a clean team; Insider List to include Mr. R. Hale (CIO), Ms. Priya Nand (Deputy CISO), Dr. L. Ocampo (Medical Director), and external counsel at Darlowe & Mint PLLC; records retained for 5 years.
Blackout: Employees with equity awards enter trading blackout from signing until two full trading days after Form 8‑K; anti‑tipping reminder per Rule 10b‑5 and company policy.
Healthcare/GLBA/HIPAA: No PHI or GLBA‑covered NPI leaves the secure clean room; sample datasets will be tokenized; dataset IDs: H‑HIP‑3A‑xx91 and GL‑BA‑007••; audit trail retained in VDR.
Conditions: HSR filing; OCC non‑objection for trust operations; Buyer agrees a cyber event at immaterial subsidiaries will not constitute a MAC; reverse termination fee: $55,000,000.
Commercial: Key supplier consent for cloud EHR renewal; minimum cash at close: ≥ $120,000,000; break‑up fee: $35,000,000; exclusivity through 08/30/26; no-shop with fiduciary out.
Benign marketing/education: the internal ESG + crypto lunch‑and‑learn uses generic case studies and does not reference Heliava’s wallets, emissions trajectories, or deal KPIs.
Contacts: Buyer—Mr. S. Calder, Managing Director, s.calder@vastrum.example; Seller—Ms. Tara Bloom, GC, tara.bloom@heliava.example; d a t a   r o o m: https://vault.hel iava.local/r/Tx‑9xq3?t=1_2_xX.
Notes: For OCR—A c c t : **88 42 (masked); C U S I P : n/a; internal channel: #harbor‑quill; phone: (555) 000‑xx77; deal code: HQ‑26‑A.
Policy carve‑out: Notwithstanding the above, generic policy documents and public sustainability FAQs may be shared with marketing; blog references to “breach” are editorial and not incident‑related.
Disclosures: This term sheet is non‑binding except for exclusivity, confidentiality, and information‑barrier covenants; governing law: Delaware; circulated to q4‑ops; please do not forward externally.
